source: Notion: Ads) Back to School - Persona Templates (37832d9551dd80c58a1ae641b6e334aa)
_scope: Ortho campaign (braces/Invisalign). 5 personas. Offers come later (no offer field yet). Each persona: 2 versions. Deliverables per client: Post + Story, Image + Video.
_method: Headlines rewritten with the Ogilvy skill: benefit + news (back-to-school/seasonal hook) + audience flag, plain language, ~7-9 words, no negatives, one promise each. Clarkson keeps a 'new season/fall' hook (her brief bans kids + literal school imagery); Yang leads with expertise, season as timing.

dr-a-joe.audience: Parents 30-45, middle-income, comparing 2-3 orthodontists, cost-conscious, want simple clear pricing
dr-a-joe.coreStrategy: Lead with ease + affordability + flexibility. Frame back-to-school as the practical time to lock in a simple routine; keep starting low-commitment.
dr-a-joe.visualFocus: Simple, relatable families/individuals; clean (not overly designed) layouts; light everyday back-to-school cues
dr-a-joe.doNotShow: Luxury/high-end aesthetics; overly emotional/aspirational imagery; cluttered visuals
dr-a-joe.headline: Back-to-School Braces That Fit Your Budget
dr-a-joe.subhead: Simple monthly plans and an easy first visit — before the school year ramps up.

dr-m-rogers.audience: Parents 30-45 with kids 8-16, local households, review-driven, value long-term provider relationships
dr-m-rogers.coreStrategy: Position back-to-school as a natural time to begin with a provider who's there all year. Reinforce the neighborhood orthodontist; emphasize comfort and the family's school-year rhythm.
dr-m-rogers.visualFocus: Real families, parent + child moments; warm candid lifestyle photos; in-office, after-school-visit feel
dr-m-rogers.doNotShow: Overly polished/luxury imagery; hard offer graphics or discount callouts; clinical/equipment-heavy visuals
dr-m-rogers.headline: Send Them Back to School With a Confident Smile
dr-m-rogers.subhead: Comfort-first braces & Invisalign from a neighborhood team that's with you all year.
dr-m-rogers.disclaimer: New patients only. Offer valid through 8/31/2026. See office for details.

dr-g-house.audience: Parents 30-50 with 1-3 kids, value consistency and quality, willing to invest, juggling multiple schedules
dr-g-house.coreStrategy: Highlight a smooth, well-managed experience that fits school-year logistics. Position the start of the year as a proactive, organized decision. Quality without feeling luxury.
dr-g-house.visualFocus: Clean, modern office environments; confident families, slightly elevated styling; organized 'new year' tone
dr-g-house.doNotShow: Discount-heavy/price-driven messaging; overly casual or chaotic family scenes; flashy luxury / 'VIP' visuals
dr-g-house.headline: Start the School Year With Their Smile on Track
dr-g-house.subhead: Expert braces & Invisalign, managed around your school-year schedule.

dr-k-clarkson.audience: Adults 25-55, working professionals, image-conscious, considering Invisalign/cosmetic braces, motivated by appearance and confidence
dr-k-clarkson.coreStrategy: Keep the seasonal hook light — an end-of-summer personal reset. Focus on confidence and discreet, lifestyle-friendly treatment; transformation without drama.
dr-k-clarkson.visualFocus: Adults in lifestyle settings (work, social, outdoors); close-up confident natural smiles; clean modern aesthetic, subtle early-fall tone
dr-k-clarkson.doNotShow: Kids or family-focused visuals; heavy back-to-school school imagery; braces-heavy/clinical shots; price-first messaging
dr-k-clarkson.headline: A New Season for a More Confident Smile
dr-k-clarkson.subhead: Discreet Invisalign that fits your work and your life.

dr-c-yang.audience: Parents researching complex orthodontic needs; adults with prior relapse; research-driven, analytical decision-makers
dr-c-yang.coreStrategy: Lead with expertise and precision. Position the new season as a smart, timely point to begin treatment planning. Focus on long-term outcomes, not seasonal convenience.
dr-c-yang.visualFocus: Doctor-led visuals (consultation/explanation moments); clean clinical environments (warm, not cold); subtle credibility signals
dr-c-yang.doNotShow: Playful/emotional/lifestyle-heavy imagery; kid-centric back-to-school cliches (buses, etc.); trendy/'fun' direction
dr-c-yang.headline: Start the School Year With a Specialist's Plan
dr-c-yang.subhead: Precision treatment planning and proven outcomes for complex cases.
